title: Plan with Claude Opus, Build with Kimi K2.6? LIVE Mixed-Provider Benchmark
summary: Cole Medin tested mixed-provider workflows combining Claude Opus and Kimi K2.6 for code generation tasks. Using the Archon benchmark tool, he ran four workflow configurations against three GitHub issues and scored the resulting pull requests across seven dimensions to determine the optimal provider arrangement for planning versus implementation.
